description_long: This is a large hardcover book with a predominantly blue cover featuring an illustration of two white swans flying over a calm, blue-toned water background. The front cover is visually striking, with the illustration occupying most of the space and a circular sticker indicating updated content. The spine is also blue, with vertically oriented text and a small red and black publisher logo at the bottom. The back cover contains a detailed summary, author information, and additional publisher branding, all set against the same blue water motif. The book appears thick, suggesting a substantial number of pages, and the edges are clean and white. The overall appearance is professional and academic, suitable for educational or reference use.
description: A large, blue hardcover book with a serene swan illustration on the front and detailed text on the back. The spine features vertical text and a publisher logo.
description_view_0: The spine of the book is visible, showing vertical blue text on a white background, a small red and black publisher logo at the bottom, and a label indicating the edition.
description_view_1: The front cover displays a blue background with two white swans flying over water, a circular sticker, and prominent title text.
description_view_2: The top edge of the book is shown, revealing the white pages and blue cover edges, with no text or illustrations visible.
description_view_3: The back cover features a summary, author information, and publisher branding, all set against a blue water-themed background.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration on the front cover depicts two white swans in flight over a tranquil, blue water surface. The style is realistic and serene, with soft gradients and a peaceful atmosphere.
attribute_title_text: PROGRAMMING Principles and Practice Using C++
attribute_spine_design: The spine is primarily white with blue vertical text and a blue border, featuring a small red and black publisher logo at the bottom. The edition label is placed near the top in a light blue box.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small rectangular red and black logo with white text is visible at the bottom of the spine.
